tfidf_logreg.description: Baseline: TF-IDF (n-grams 1-2, 10k features) + one-vs-rest logistic regression with class_weight=balanced, trained on the 500-record training split. Decision threshold = 0.5 (sklearn predict default).

claude_haiku_fewshot.description: Few-shot Claude Haiku (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, 6 examples): single API run returns per-permission confidence scores; 6 threshold configurations applied post-hoc.
